info.DAtuviSezaH: gupUDUpavicCipaRipaniBya AyaH 3.1.28 ityanena asmAt DAtoH svArTe 'Aya' iti pratyayaH viDIyate   ayam pratyayaH AyAdaya ArDaDAtuke vA 3.1.31 ityanena ArDaDAtukavivakzAyAm vikalpyate
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' DUpAyatIti santApe BAzArTe DUpayediti ' (Slo. 130) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'DUmaketO saptarzInupaDUpayati' (sati) (kO0 sU0 93127) DUmenAvfRvati sati tamasA''cCAdayati sati
'pAvakArcizaH saDUmA nizpetuH tABirnAgaloka upaDUpite' (BA0 Adi0 815).. upaDUpite santapte
